headline: Why Enphase (ENPH) Shares Are Falling Today
summary: Shares of home energy technology company Enphase (NASDAQ:ENPH) fell 4.1% in the afternoon session after TD Cowen significantly lowered its price target on the stock due to a difficult residential solar market. The firm cut its target on the solar microinverter maker from $70 to $48 while keeping a Hold rating. Analysts highlighted that building permit data showed second-quarter demand failed to deliver its typical seasonal pickup, signaling a weaker installation pipeline. Furthermore, analysts p
